visual.name: flowmap
visual.description: Flowmap is a diagram that visualizes the movement of objects from one location to another.

dataRoles.description: Non-negative values moving between origins and destinations
dataRoles.name: width

dataRoles.description: (Optional) The longitudes of the corresponding destinations
dataRoles.name: DLong

dataRoles.description: (Optional) Friendly origin names to display in tooltips. The "Origin" field is used by default.
dataRoles.name: OName

dataRoles.description: (Optional) Friendly destination names to display in tooltips. The "Destination" field is used by default.
dataRoles.name: DName

dataRoles.description: (Optional) Content to show when hovering flows.
dataRoles.name: Tooltip

dataRoles.description: (Optional) Content to show when clicking icons.
dataRoles.name: Label

direction.description: Merge lines based on origin or destination

limit.description: Maximum number of flows displayed simultaneously

valueFormat.description: Change the format of values shown in tooltips, etc.

precFix.description: The number of digits that follow the decimal point

lang.description: The language used in the map

cache.description: Cache geocoding results for next time
